meaning: 科修斯科山[澳大利亚东南部](在新南威尔士州东南端,是澳大利亚山脉
examples: She was born to unmarried parents in Kosciusko, Mississippi, in a house without indoor plumbing.
If her campaign is successful, Kosciusko-Morizet plans to launch an online forum allowing Parisians to voice their own ideas for renovating these forgotten stations.
Nathalie Kosciusko-Morizet, member of the centre-right Union pour un mouvement populaire party, is one of six candidates running for mayor of the French capital in March 2014.
